stories.title: Free CSDB Early Literacy Event at Bear Creek — Tomorrow, April 17

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text: FREE outdoor literacy event for COS families with deaf/hard-of-hearing kids (birth–8). Tomorrow at Bear Creek — Apr 17, 1:30–3 PM. ASL reading, wildlife walk. Register: outreach@csdb.org #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: COS families with deaf/hard-of-hearing kids: CSDB is hosting a FREE Early Literacy Event with an ASL interpreter tomorrow. Apr 17, 1:30–3 PM at Bear Creek Nature Center. Free, birth–8. 🌿 #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

stories.title: CPSC Recalls Goregent Infant Walkers Over Fall Hazard — Sold on Amazon

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text: SAFETY RECALL: CPSC has recalled ~90 Goregent infant walkers sold on Amazon in January 2026 for ~$90. The green walker can fit through doorways and won't stop at a step edge — fall risk. Stop use immediately. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text: If you bought a Goregent infant walker on Amazon (~$90, Jan 2026): stop use now. To get a refund, disassemble, write "Recalled" on it, and email GoregentInfantWalkersRecall@outlook.com. Recall issued March 19. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: CPSC Recalls Goregent Infant Walkers Sold on Amazon — Stop Use Immediately

|------|-----------|------------|

stories.title: Colorado Lawmakers Protect School Funding in 2026-27 Budget

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text: Colorado's 2026-27 state budget protects school funding despite a revenue shortfall — good news for D11, D20, and D49 families in Colorado Springs. The budget is heading to the Governor for signature. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

stories.title: AAP Says Start HPV Vaccination at Age 9 — What COS Families Should Know

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text: The AAP is recommending the HPV vaccine starting at age 9 — earlier than CDC guidance. Two doses at 9-12 means more flexibility and better completion rates. Ask your pediatrician. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: The AAP Wants Kids to Start HPV Vaccination at Age 9 — Here's What Families Should Know

research.facts:
AAP HPV Vaccination Blog
| Fact | Source(s) | Confidence |
|------|-----------|------------|
| AAP blog "The Time Is Now — Starting HPV Protection Early" published April 7, 2026 | aap.org confirmed in search | HIGH |
| AAP recommends 2-dose HPV vaccine starting at age 9-12 | aap.org + publications.aap.org + pubmed | HIGH |
| CDC updated to 1-dose at age 11-12 (different from AAP) | Multiple sources confirm the distinction | HIGH |
| Earlier initiation (age 9-10) improves completion by age 13 | PMC research article (peer reviewed) | HIGH |
| HPV vaccine protects against cancers (cervical, throat, etc.) | Standard AAP/CDC guidance | HIGH |
| Series: 2 doses if started before 15, 3 doses if started later | Standard AAP guidance | HIGH |

stories.title: D11 Budget Season — Cutting Admin, Boosting Classroom Support

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text: For the third year in a row, D11 is cutting central administration to direct more resources to classrooms. School programs and staffing won't be affected. Teachers saw double-digit pay increases last year. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: D11 Is Cutting Central Administration Again — and Directing More Resources to Classrooms
